headline: Leopold Aschenbrenner's 'Situational Awareness' Files 13F Quarterly Investment Disclosure
summary: The Gen Z AI savant’s multibillion-dollar fund made a rash of short positions against chipmakers while expanding its bullish bets on compute and memory stocks.

headline: Mizuho Raises its Price Target on Corning (GLW)
summary: Corning Incorporated (NYSE:GLW) is one of the 10 Fastest Growing S&P 500 Stocks to Buy Now. On May 12, 2026, Mizuho raised the firm’s price target on Corning Incorporated (NYSE:GLW) to $220 from $190 while maintaining an Outperform rating on the shares. On May 7, 2026, Oppenheimer also raised the firm’s price target on Corning […]
